content: Eduardo runs InsureTechABQ, DBA ABQ Growth Partners — an insurance tech business
Eduardo uses this assistant on his iMac and MacBook (both macOS)

Moore Quality Air V2 website project — live at https://eduardobudanauro-design.github.io/Moore-Quality-Air/. Repo: eduardobudanauro-design/Moore-Quality-Air. Multi-page static site (HTML/CSS/JS). Hosting: GitHub Pages. Outstanding: real job photos needed for Gallery/hero, contact form needs Formspree ID, domain cutover to moorequalityair.com pending (old site still live there). Logo is hand-built SVG tornado funnel. Need original logo file for pixel-exact swap.

Eduardo's voice and writing profile: AI educator, business growth coach, 30+ year insurance veteran. Writing style: facts first, build to the point, short sentences for impact, flowing paragraphs default. Core values: honor, integrity, truth, ethics. Motto: 'Edutainment — entertain, educate, equip. All three or it is not finished.' Never: punch down, fake stats, say AI makes money easy.
InsurePass is Eduardo's product to solve the insurance industry licensing barrier problem — the industry treats retention as a people problem but it is actually a licensing barrier problem.

Moore Quality Air — confirmed business facts: Phone 505-221-6352. Address 3301-R Coors Blvd NW Suite 200 Albuquerque NM 87120. Hours Mon-Fri 8AM-5PM, NO 24/7 (emergency only for existing customers). Service area: Albuquerque, Rio Rancho, Corrales, Los Lunas ONLY (NOT Bernalillo, Placitas, Santa Fe, East Mountains). Owners: Jonathan McDaniel founder 2013, Anthony Hughes partnered 2015. Tagline: Comfort Is Just a Call Away.

Moore Quality Air services: HVAC (swamp cooler repair/install, swamp-cooler to refrigerated-air conversions = specialty, AC, gas furnaces, heat pumps, IAQ, smart thermostats) + fixture plumbing (water heaters, tankless, faucets, toilets, hose bibs, disposals). Residential only. Does NOT do drain snaking, sewer, slab leaks, or commercial sprinklers. Credentials: NM MM-98, EE-98, Universal EPA, Rheem Pro Partner, Energy Star, NATE, HomeAdvisor Best of 2017 & 2018. Promos: 0% financing, Inventory Blowout Sale, veteran/military/senior discounts.
